title: How I Used Claude Code to Build a $481k App
summary: Austin Marchese demonstrates launching a $481k annual revenue product in 45 days using Claude Code without prior coding experience. He provides five concrete steps: problem-first shipping, identifying critical workflows versus reusable components, learning vocabulary over syntax, slow planning for fast execution, and proactive failure mapping. The video includes seven specific prompts for tasks like dependency audits, payment flow testing, and rollback strategies.
